description: Promote sk-code react/ and go/ from placeholder to live branches. Frontend modeled on kerkmeester.com (Next.js 14 App Router + vanilla-extract + motion v12 + Untitled UI + react-hook-form/zod + react-aria + Sonner + next-themes). Backend paired: gin + sqlc + Postgres + go-playground/validator + golang-jwt. Cross-stack pairing doc documents React↔Go API contract, JWT handoff, error envelope, CORS, Vercel + Railway deploy topology. SKILL.md routing updated to move REACT and GO from PLACEHOLDER_STACKS to LIVE_STACKS with full intent → file maps. No new branch label or detection edits — uses existing Next.js → REACT and go.mod → GO precedent.
